title: Runtime Sanitizers, Dynamic Analysis, and Language Profiles · Policy Clinic: Sanitizer Ci
summary: Add runtime instrumentation to native and managed-language test profiles. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates sanitizer ci increment in a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.
Use runtime warnings, leak checks, fuzzing, and framework diagnostics for managed languages.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
